allocation.html: Use this template to send confirmation after successful allocation.
no-problem.html: General response template when checking the system and notifying the student that there are no issues.
drop-out.html: Used when users report being unable to create a drop-out ticket.
make-order-failed: Response when users report being unable to create an order (make order failed) or cannot find customer information.
no-payment-date: Response when users report being unable to select a payment date when adding payment, or issues related to payment date and order creation date.
not-active.html: Send notification when the system detects the course is currently not active.
not-resale-upsale: Response when users report being UNABLE to create or perform resale/upsale operations. Note: if it does not mention being UNABLE to perform resale or upsale, it is not related.
pay-not-full.html: Used after allocating funds and receiving remaining > 0 - when the customer has paid but not 100% of the tuition fee (partial payment). Reminder to pay the remaining balance.
refund-reward-point.html: Notification related to refunding reward points/student points.
request-re-running.html: Used when users request re-running - requesting to reopen a class (for finished classes).
sync-v2-to-v1.html: Notification that customer account data is being synced and updated between the CRM V2 system and the legacy V1 version.
tick-uncompleted.html: Sent to students when the student status is related to tick uncompleted.
